text:
nfcutils

Listing NFC devices and in-field tags or targets

lsnfc is a simple command that lists tags which are in your NFC device field http://nfc-tools.org 


Source code can be found at
https://github.com/terence-deng/nfcutils 
  - Forked from https://github.com/nfc-tools/nfcutils

https://github.com/terence-deng/nfcutils-ports
